description: Plants found in modern urban and suburban settings.
plants: Street Tree
A city-planted tree growing out of a square of dirt in the sidewalk, its roots cracking the concrete.
Window Box Flower
Bright blooms spilling out of a planter on a windowsill, a small defiance against concrete and glass.
Rooftop Garden Herb
A potted herb growing on a rooftop, tended carefully and flavoring meals in the apartment below.
Parking Lot Weed
A scrappy plant forcing itself through asphalt, thriving on neglect and motor oil.
Manicured Hedge
A wall of green trimmed into perfect geometry, marking property lines with living architecture.
Ornamental Grass
Tall decorative grass planted along modern buildings, swaying elegantly but serving no purpose beyond beauty.
Community Garden Plot
Vegetables and flowers crowded together in a raised bed, each plant chosen with care and hope.
Fire Escape Vine
A climbing plant winding up a metal fire escape, softening the harsh lines of an old building.
Office Lobby Palm
A potted tropical plant standing in an air-conditioned lobby, far from any breeze it would recognize.
Abandoned Lot Wildflower
Flowers blooming in a vacant lot between buildings, reclaiming the space nobody else wants.
